entities.name: MILLETS
entities.description: Strategic food crops in arid and drought-prone ecologies that provide sustainable yield and nutrients

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: Environmental stress characterized by water scarcity that affects crop yield

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The agricultural productivity of crops, which is low in millets under stress

entities.name: MALNUTRITION
entities.description: A condition of nutrient deficiency that millets help prevent

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Global environmental shift causing adverse effects on food and nutritional security

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The availability and access to nutritious food to sustain populations

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The genetic ability of plants to maintain productivity under drought stress

entities.name: MIRNAS
entities.description: Small RNAs that control trait expression and are involved in gene regulation

entities.name: GENE REGULATION
entities.description: The biological process of controlling the expression of genes

entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A strategic millet species used for identifying novel miRNAs and gene targets

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A strategic millet species used for identifying novel miRNAs and gene targets

entities.name: FOXTAIL MILLET
entities.description: A strategic millet species used for identifying novel miRNAs and gene targets

entities.name: FINGER MILLET
entities.description: A strategic millet species used for identifying novel miRNAs and gene targets

entities.name: PROSO MILLET
entities.description: A strategic millet species used for identifying novel miRNAs and gene targets

entities.name: IN SILICO ANALYSIS
entities.description: Computational methods used to identify miRNAs and gene targets from genomic resources

entities.name: DROUGHT-RESPONSIVE GENES
entities.description: Genes that respond to drought stress and are regulated by miRNAs

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTION FACTORS
entities.description: Proteins that regulate the transcription of genes, identified as targets of miRNAs

entities.name: PROTEIN FAMILIES
entities.description: Groups of proteins with similar functions, identified as targets of miRNAs

entities.name: NETWORK ANALYSIS
entities.description: A method used to visualize the regulation of drought stress by miRNAs through targets

entities.name: FUNCTIONAL MARKERS
entities.description: Genetic markers derived from miRNA-regulated genes for yield improvement
